note: Plannivo is a deployed React APP, not a component library (private package, no exports, app-style dist/, UI = Ant Design + MUI + Headless UI + Tailwind composed inline in coupled feature modules). /design-sync therefore produces a hand-authored BRAND FOUNDATION only — tokens + fonts + styles.css + guidelines — so the Claude Design agent designs new pages on-brand. No _ds_bundle.js / components / _ds_sync.json (no isolable library to bundle, nothing to render-verify).
sourcesOfTruth: src/main.jsx (Antd ConfigProvider theme tokens: colorPrimary/info/success/warning, Button hovers)
src/index.css (:root brand vars, @font-face, btn-floating gradients, form-builder teal accents, radii/shadows)
